description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior is predominantly white with large, black-framed windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front features a prominent entryway with a double-height glass section and a large garage door adjacent to a paved driveway. The upper floor includes several rooms with visible interior walls painted in muted tones, and a distinctive arched window at the rear. The house has a mix of rectangular and arched windows, and the rear side features a semi-circular window design that adds architectural interest. The structure is likely constructed from concrete, glass, and steel, with interior spaces designed for residential living.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a prominent entryway with a garage. The design features clean lines, white walls, and a mix of rectangular and arched windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double-height glass section, garage door, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the depth of the house, with the garage and driveway extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the distinctive arched window and semi-circular window design, as well as large glass panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary entry, and the overall rectangular footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent main entry with double-height glass, flat overhang, and adjacent garage door
